input_text: question: Exactly. I did more tests to learn Taumoeba's limits. In Adrian air, they can live from minus 180 degrees Celsius to 107 degrees Celsius. Outside that range they die.

question: Right. Extended testing done. Taumoeba viable between minus 180 and plus 107 Celsius in Adrian air. Death occurs outside.
question: Correct. Further experiments conducted. Taumoeba thermal tolerance—180 minus to 107 plus Celsius in Adrian environment. Fatal otherwise.
question: Yes. Comprehensive testing performed. Taumoeba habitat—Adrian atmosphere between minus 180 and 107 Celsius. Lethal extremes.
question: Affirmed. Extensive analysis completed. Taumoeba temperature tolerance: 180 to 107 Celsius in Adrian air. Survival impossible beyond.
question: Confirmed. Thorough testing done. Taumoeba functional between minus 180 and plus 107 Celsius Adriatic atmosphere. Outside lethal.
question: Absolutely. Detailed experiments performed. Taumoeba viable—Adrian environment from 180 minus through 107 plus Celsius. Beyond fatal.
question: Indeed. Rigorous testing conducted. Taumoeba survives Adrian air 180 to 107 Celsius range. Death outside parameters.
question: Precisely. Extensive testing executed. Taumoeba habitat—Adrian atmosphere minus 180 to plus 107 Celsius. Lethal exterior.
